answers.audience: Minecraft semi-anarchy players checking a trade partner before exchanging items or currency
answers.primary_goal: Search a player name, UUID, alias, or Discord ID and decide whether to proceed with a trade
answers.must_have: mobile-first, AA accessibility, fast search, transparent source methodology, keyboard-visible focus states
answers.forbidden: purple-blue AI gradients, glowing blobs, fake testimonials, fake statistics, fake authorities, generic SaaS hero, fearmongering, vague copy
answers.reference_brands: Have I Been Pwned, Consumer Reports, Minecraft Wiki, Discord Safety Center
answers.success_metric: Visitor can find the search field immediately, understand the list's limits, and inspect a matched profile on mobile without horizontal scrolling
